content: Fix carousel image loading performance - add loading='lazy' to carousel images after the first
Implement responsive images with srcset for artwork pages
Optimize carousel JS to prevent layout shift (CLS)
Run Lighthouse audit to identify specific performance bottlenecks
Add SRI hashes to Stripe script tags
Add SRI hashes to Google Analytics script tags
Add SRI hashes to Bulma CSS, Font Awesome, and other CDN resources
Move hardcoded API keys to Netlify environment variables
Add Related Artworks sections to connect the 42 artwork pages
Implement BreadcrumbList schema on artwork pages
Improve artwork image alt text descriptions to be more descriptive
Phase 1: Implement VisualArtwork structured data (JSON-LD) for all 42 artwork pages
Phase 2: Implement automated image pipeline with WebP/AVIF generation using custom Gulp task
Phase 3: Implement automated SRI hash generation using custom Node.js crypto implementation
